channel.title: Wifi on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Wifi on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: OTA WLAN packet capture
item.description: Capturing raw WLAN frames Over-The-Air isn’t the most straightforwad thing to do. This articles paves the way for achieving that easily on Linux with cheap hardware. Cherry on the cake : full 6GHz spectrum is supported (up to Wi-Fi 6E).
